user.title: SolaxCloud API
user.description: Enter your SolaxCloud Developer Portal credentials. You can find these at https://developer.solaxcloud.com under your Application settings.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate SolaxCloud API
reauth_confirm.description: Enter your new Client Secret to restore the connection.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to SolaxCloud API. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your Client ID and Client Secret in the Developer Portal.

abort.already_configured: SolaxCloud API is already configured. Only one instance is supported (one active token per application).
